title: Box MCP Server for Claude
detailMarkdown:
# Box MCP Server for Claude

Access enterprise content, analyze unstructured data, and automate workflows

- **Category:** mcp
- **Author:** Box
- **Download trust:** first-party
- **Tags:** `storage` `box` `enterprise` `document-management` `collaboration`

## Install
```bash
claude mcp list && claude mcp status box
```

## Config
```json
{
  "box": {
    "url": "https://mcp.box.com/",
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp list && claude mcp status box

- https://heyclau.de/mcp/box-mcp-server
- https://box.dev/guides/box-mcp/remote/
